name: Marko Novak // first meeting
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Request / Alt

Every day was basically like an endless loop. It was a miserable day over and over again, but saving up for college all on his own wasn’t nothing..

If dealing with old drunkards that complained about America being ruined meant going to college at some point at his life, he would try to push through it. Just like today.

Maybe another person could save him from this miserable time?

_____________________________

Thank you for your request!! （╹◡╹）♡

900 FOLLOWERS ALREADY?? What the actual freakzoid 😨 I love you all sm 🫶🫶⁉️

I don’t know whether someone will go a fluff way or an angsty way so I’ll just put both tags. And also because why not? 🫡

Didn’t expect Marko to get 2 requests for alt scenarios but I’m not complaining
